screenshots.heading: See it in action
screenshots.subheading: From first-launch setup to live transmission. Here's what VoxDMR looks like.
hero.subtitle: Join BrandMeister DMR talkgroups from your Windows or Linux PC.
features.heading: Built for DMR
features.subheading: Everything you need to get on BrandMeister from your computer.
features.ptt.title: PTT Modes
features.ptt.description: Hold the spacebar or any configured key to transmit. Configurable per-server. Latch mode keeps you transmitting without holding. Useful for hands-free operation.
features.ambe.title: AMBE+2 Vocoder
features.ambe.description: Real AMBE+2 voice codec running the MD-380 firmware on x86_64. Same audio quality as a hardware DMR radio.
features.talkgroups.title: BrandMeister Talkgroups
features.talkgroups.description: Browse and switch between thousands of BrandMeister talkgroups. Favorites, search, and live activity indicators.
features.rewind.title: Rewind Protocol
features.rewind.description: Connects via the open Rewind protocol used by hotspot firmware like Pi-Star. Just need a DMR ID and a hotspot password. No proprietary client software.
features.free.title: Free to Use
features.free.description: No account, no telemetry, no subscription. Download a release binary and start transmitting.
features.crossPlatform.title: Cross-Platform
features.crossPlatform.description: Native Linux and Windows binaries. Same UI, same audio engine, same experience on both platforms.
cta.heading: Get on the Air
cta.description: Free to download. No account needed. Install VoxDMR, enter your DMR ID, and you're on the air.
support.heading: Like the app? Buy me a coffee
support.description: I build VoxDMR in my free time, on my own dime. If it's helped you get on the air or made your QSOs a little more fun, a small tip on Ko-fi goes a long way toward new features and keeping the project going.
privacy.title: Privacy Policy
privacy.overview.title: Overview
privacy.overview.text: VoxDMR is desktop software for connecting to BrandMeister DMR talkgroups. This policy explains what data the app stores and what network connections it makes.
privacy.dataCollection.title: Data Collection
privacy.dataCollection.text: VoxDMR does not collect, store, or transmit any personal data to the developer or any third party. The app contains no analytics, advertising, or tracking of any kind.
privacy.dataStored.title: Data Stored on Your Device
privacy.dataStored.intro: The app stores the following data locally on your device only:
privacy.dataStored.serverProfilesDesc: DMR ID, hotspot password, server address, talkgroup settings, and PTT key binding. Stored in ~/.config/voxdmr/
privacy.dataStored.appPreferencesDesc: audio device selection, PTT mode, UI preferences
privacy.dataStored.outro: This data never leaves your device except when connecting directly to BrandMeister servers.
privacy.microphone.title: Microphone
privacy.microphone.text: VoxDMR accesses your device microphone solely for push-to-talk voice transmission to BrandMeister DMR servers. Audio is encoded using the AMBE+2 codec and sent directly to the server you are connected to. Audio is not recorded, stored, or transmitted elsewhere.
privacy.network.title: Network Communication
privacy.network.intro: VoxDMR makes the following network connections:
privacy.network.tcpDesc: real-time audio and control to BrandMeister servers you configure
privacy.network.udpDesc: firmware download from md380.org and GitHub, SHA-256 verified. Only triggered when you click "Download" during setup.
privacy.network.outro: No other network connections are made. There is no telemetry, no update check, and no cloud service.
privacy.thirdParty.title: Third-Party Services
privacy.thirdParty.text: VoxDMR does not use any third-party services, SDKs, or APIs beyond the BrandMeister network and firmware download sources. There are no ads, analytics, crash reporting, or cloud services.
privacy.reflectorServers.title: BrandMeister Network
privacy.reflectorServers.text: VoxDMR connects to BrandMeister DMR servers operated by independent parties. The developer of VoxDMR does not operate, control, or moderate these servers. Communication through these servers is real-time voice between connected users.
privacy.children.title: Children
privacy.children.text: VoxDMR is not directed at children under 13. The app requires a licensed amateur radio DMR ID to operate.
privacy.changes.title: Changes
privacy.changes.text: This privacy policy may be updated. Changes will be posted at this URL with an updated date.
privacy.contact.title: Contact
privacy.contact.text: If you have questions about this privacy policy, contact:
